name: ed3design-engineering-bundles
description: Engineering-discipline library for Claude Code: 8 skills across 3 thematic bundles covering parametric CAD design, FDM/maker workflows, and embedded systems integration. Empirically validated patterns from real-world engineering practice.

plugins.name: cad-design
plugins.description: Parametric CAD design disciplines: 5 skills covering CAD API scripting (Fusion 360, OpenSCAD), parametric construction workflows, mechanical design principles, image-to-mesh-CAD pipelines, and Fusion 360 MCP-Bridge API quirks for Claude-driven automation.

plugins.name: maker-fdm
plugins.description: Maker disciplines for FDM-printed builds and embedded UI documentation. 2 skills covering BOM validation for multi-component builds and embedded GUI documentation from source (ESP32/Arduino with LovyanGFX, TFT_eSPI, U8g2, LVGL).

plugins.name: embedded-systems
plugins.description: Embedded systems integration disciplines for energy management and device onboarding. Starts with Victron Cerbo GX Modbus-TCP device onboarding (the non-obvious Enabled=0 default). Future-proofed for additional Modbus, CAN-bus, and IoT integration patterns.
